title: Burger King India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Burger King India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Burger King India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Burger King India:
Burger King India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Burger King India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
